titleStmt.title: SII 31.91: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 91. (A.R. No. B 305 of 1938.) BEḌUDŪRU, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab used as a beam in the Venkaṭēśvaraswāmi temple.
It is dated in the Cyclic year Parābhava, Mārgaśira, ba. 2. Since the cyclic year falls during the Śaka year 1468, the date of the record corresponds to December 9, Thursday, 1546 A.D.

It registers the gift of dommaripannu made by Gōpurāju, the grandson of Domari Sirigireḍi and Chenadēvi, Chinagaṁgarāju, son of Pasela Tiparāju and Timmarāju, son of Murāri Peda Aruḷaya of Dommari community, to the temples of Tiruvengaḷanātha, Chennakēsava and Mahālinga on the hill of Beḍadūru alias Narasimhapuram situated in the Ghaṇḍikōṭasīma. The village is given inturn as a gift to Nandyāla Timmarāju by Sadāśivadēvarāya. It further records the remission (kaṭaḍa) of 7 ga per year towards the sthalavajadu (coul ?) for ploughing (adikāḍi) the land by the Kāmpus.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭi parābhava saṁvatsara mā
¨rgaśira ba 2lu śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīsadāśiva
rāyalu dēvarāyalu
vidyanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁ
hāsanārūḍhulai pridhivī sā
mrājyaṁbu śē(sē)yucuṁḍagānu
domari sirigiriḍi cenādēvi
gāri manumaḍu gōparāja
nu pasela tiparāju koḍuku
cinagaṁgarājunu murāri pe
da Aruḷayakoḍuku tiṁ
marājanu janaliguruṁnu gaṁ
ḍi kōṭasīmalōya saṁdyāla
tiṁmarājugāru sadāśiva dē
vamahārāyala cātanu śāsa
naṁ pucukoni tamataṁḍri
pēra sēsina beḍanūriki pratinā
mamayina narasiṁhāpuraṁ A
grahāramaṁdu koṁḍamīdi
tiruveṁgaḷanādhanikini cenakē
śvaruni mahāliṁgānikini
yī mūḍu dēvasdhānālakaṁnu
doṁmaripaṁnnu sarigānu dhāra
vōsi māIravayinālugu
kulāla viḷavāriki puṇyaṁgā
nu cepanadēśālu celiyiṁcē
Iruvayi nālgukulāla doṁma
¨rla vāri putrapautrapāraṁpa
ryaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasdhāyi
gānu yī mūḍudēvasdhānālaku
Iccina dha¨rma śāsanaṁ yīgrā
mamaṁdu Aḍakāḍivēsi du
nina kāṁpulunu stala vaja du
kunu yēḍu 1 ki va ga Þ I
kṣarālanu yenimidi
lunu Iya kaṭaḍa cē
duku yevaru vakriṁci
doma¨rlla gāḍadula kā
māṁsaṁ Iccinavārani
mu dhāravōstimi I
mi paṁdakākāṁpulu
mi dha¨rmā naku māIruvainālu
gu kulāladoma¨rla lōyavaru ta
pinānu vāṁḍu dēvaradēśālaku ve
likuṁḍu vāriki veli . yiṁduku talli
ni vāṁḍu tamakula
cinavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 31.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
